title: GTM Regulatory Outlook — Asia-Pacific — Q2 2026
summary: Australia's dual-track Travel Rule enforcement and stablecoin PSP licensing, South Korea's Q4 custody framework comment deadline, and Indonesia's live Q3 OJK custody standards create a 90-day institutional compliance sprint across 200+ banks, exchanges, and PSPs from Sydney to Seoul. Philippines BSP active audits, Thailand's Q3 licensing expansion, and India's securities classification framework combine to open $180M+ addressable market through September.

regulators.focus: Stablecoin licensing, travel rule enforcement, DPT oversight
